text: 🐻 Here's everything you need to know about the past 24 hours: ➡️ Google and the Pentagon have signed a confidential agreement in the field of artificial intelligence ➡️ African Corps make a statement on the situation in Mali , and strikes Kidal ➡️ The May 9th parade in Moscow will be held without military equipment ➡️ Putin holds a meeting with Congolese President Sassou-Nguesso ➡️ Russia might already be operating AI-guided Geran drones ➡️ Chris reports from the Strait of Hormuz. ➡️ Hegseth is once again trying to explain why they had to attack Iran again if their nuclear facilities have already been obliterated , and claims they are definitely winning ➡️ General Caine answers the uncomfortable question of whether they considered that Iran might close the Strait of Hormuz ➡️ Former Ukrainian Commander-in-Chief Zaluzhny makes a very strange comment about what Ukraine's victory means to him ➡️ Some new details about the incident during the White House Correspondents' Dinner ➡️ Trump and Putin hold a phone call 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🐻 以下是过去24小时你需要了解的一切： ➡️ 谷歌与五角大楼签署了一份关于人工智能领域的保密协议 ➡️ 非洲军团就马里局势发表声明，并对基达尔发动袭击 ➡️ 莫斯科5月9日阅兵式将不展示军事装备 ➡️ 普京与刚果总统萨苏-恩格索举行会晤 ➡️ 俄罗斯可能已经在使用人工智能制导的“天竺葵”无人机 ➡️ 克里斯从霍尔木兹海峡发回报道。 ➡️ 海格塞斯再次试图解释如果伊朗的核设施已经被摧毁，为什么他们必须再次攻击伊朗，并声称他们肯定会赢 ➡️ 凯恩将军回答了一个令人不安的问题，即他们是否考虑过伊朗可能会封锁霍尔木兹海峡 ➡️ 乌克兰前武装部队总司令扎卢日内就乌克兰的胜利对他意味着什么发表了非常奇怪的评论 ➡️ 关于白宫记者协会晚宴期间发生的事件的一些新细节 ➡️ 特朗普与普京通了电话 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: OSINTdefender RT @sentdefender : The Pentagon is considering outsourcing warship design and building to Korea and Japan with a proposed $1.85 billion feasibility study into the project within the proposed budget for 2027, with the study to look at the feasibility of adopting or co-producing advanced hulls such as Japan’s Mogami-class and Korea’s Daegu-class frigates to supplement the U.S. Navy, according to USNI News. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 转推 @sentdefender ：据美国海军学会新闻网（USNI News）报道，五角大楼正在考虑将战舰的设计和建造外包给韩国和日本，并在2027年的拟议预算中为该项目提出了18.5亿美元的可行性研究，该研究将探讨采用或共同生产先进船体（如日本的最上级护卫舰和韩国的大邱级护卫舰）以补充美国海军的可行性。推文

text: OSINTdefender U.S. President Donald J. Trump is slated to receive a briefing on new plans for potential military action against Iran on Thursday from the Commander of U.S. Central Command, Adm. Brad Cooper, two sources with knowledge tell Axios. Some of the options that Trump is expected to be briefed on include, but are not limited to, a “short and powerful” wave of strikes against Iranian infrastructure targets, a planned ground operation focused on taking over parts of the Strait of Hormuz and/or a special forces operation to secure Iran’s stockpile of highly enriched uranium, with plans for the last two options having been in the works since the start of the Iran War. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据两名知情人士向Axios透露，美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普定于周四听取美国中央司令部司令布拉德·库珀海军上将关于针对伊朗采取潜在军事行动的新计划的简报。特朗普预计将听取的选项包括但不限于：对伊朗基础设施目标进行“短促而有力”的打击浪潮、计划进行旨在占领霍尔木兹海峡部分地区的地面行动，和/或旨在确保伊朗高浓缩铀库存安全的特种部队行动，后两个选项的计划自伊朗战争开始以来就一直在制定中。推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 Ukrainian drones targeted Russia's Novgorod region early this Thursday morning. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 周四清晨，乌克兰无人机袭击了俄罗斯诺夫哥罗德地区。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇲🇽Governor of Sinaloa Rubén Rocha Moya rejected the charges laid out against him by the U.S. as lacking any truth. He described the charges as an attack on the Fourth Transformation political movement. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇲🇽 Mexico’s Attorney General’s Office reports they have received U.S. requests for provisional arrests for extradition purposes concerning officials from Sinaloa and will review the documentation under Mexican law. They assess that the U.S. request was not accompanied by enough conclusive evidence regarding the alleged facts. “Good afternoon, we appreciate your presence for this message from the head of the Special Prosecutor’s Office for the Investigation of Relevant Matters and spokesperson for the Attorney General’s Office, Dr. Ulises Lara López. Good afternoon, I appreciate your interest in this message to the media that we are offering to the people of Mexico regarding the information released today by authorities of the United States of America concerning officials from Sinaloa. The Attorney General’s Office informs that in this, as in any other case of international request, we must comply with each and every one of the procedures and protocols established in the current regulations on the matter. In this case, we have been notified by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the requests for provisional arrest for extradition purposes made by the Government of the United States of America. Based on the Political Constitution of the United Mexican States, the National Code of Criminal Procedure and the applicable laws, this Prosecutor’s Office, through the Special Prosecutor’s Office for International Affairs, is obligated to analyze the documentation received in order to establish with complete accuracy whether the necessary evidentiary elements exist for this purpose and, if so, the viability of the request. In parallel, this Attorney General’s Office will initiate an investigation to obtain all the necessary information to determine whether there is evidence establishing the probability that the accusation made by U.S. authorities has the legal basis to request arrest warrants. As is public knowledge, Mexican law clearly states that to request an arrest warrant from a judicial authority, it is necessary to present evidence that suggests the possibility that a person has committed a crime. However, the Bilateral Treaty on this matter clearly states that extradition will only be granted if it is determined that the evidence is sufficient according to the laws of the requested party, in this case, our country. In particular, it is necessary to clarify that this request is not accompanied by sufficient evidentiary elements that provide conclusive proof regarding the alleged facts. Furthermore, it is necessary to note that the United States of America’s own request requires the Mexican government to take the necessary measures to ensure that the information contained in any provisional arrest or extradition request that has been or will be submitted is not disclosed or made public, as occurred in this particular case. This is according to the U.S. authorities themselves. The foregoing takes into account, according to the letter itself, that disclosing such information for other purposes could be detrimental to the confidential nature of criminal proceedings in the United States and contrary to the procedural rules that govern them. The Vienna Convention on Diplomatic Relations itself establishes that appropriate measures must be taken to ensure that all information and documentation submitted in these types of cases is handled confidentially and securely in order to protect the transmitted information. Furthermore, Mexican law states that in the case of governors and senators, it is necessary to initiate impeachment proceedings to obtain a declaration that removes the procedural immunity of the public servants holding these positions. For the Attorney General’s Office, it is essential to fully comply with all legal requirements with complete respect for national sovereignty, since otherwise the rule of law would be violated, as well as the rights and guarantees of the individuals sought, which, as in the requesting State, are inalienable. Outside the law, nothing. Above the law, no one” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇲🇽锡那罗亚州州长鲁本·罗查·莫亚（Rubén Rocha Moya）驳斥了美国对他提出的指控，称其毫无事实根据。他将这些指控描述为对‘第四次转型’政治运动的攻击。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇲🇽 墨西哥总检察长办公室报告称，他们已收到美国就锡那罗亚州官员提出的临时逮捕引渡请求，并将根据墨西哥法律审查相关文件。他们评估认为，美国的请求并未附带关于所指控事实的足够确凿证据。“下午好，感谢各位出席由重大案件调查特别检察官办公室负责人兼总检察长办公室发言人乌利塞斯·拉拉·洛佩斯（Ulises Lara López）博士发表的声明。下午好，感谢各位对我们向墨西哥人民提供的关于美利坚合众国当局今天发布的有关锡那罗亚州官员信息的媒体声明的关注。总检察长办公室通报称，在此案以及任何其他国际请求案件中，我们必须遵守现行相关法规中确立的每一项程序和协议。在此案中，我们已收到外交部关于美利坚合众国政府提出的临时逮捕引渡请求的通知。根据《墨西哥合众国政治宪法》、《国家刑事诉讼法》及相关适用法律，本检察官办公室通过国际事务特别检察官办公室，有义务分析所收到的文件，以准确确定是否存在必要的证据要素，并据此确定请求的可行性。同时，本总检察长办公室将启动调查，以获取所有必要信息，确定是否有证据表明美国当局的指控具有申请逮捕令的法律依据。众所周知，墨西哥法律明确规定，向司法机关申请逮捕令，必须提供表明某人可能犯罪的证据。然而，关于此事的双边条约明确规定，只有在根据被请求方（即我国）法律确定证据充分的情况下，才会准予引渡。特别需要澄清的是，该请求并未附带提供关于所指控事实的确凿证据的充分证据要素。此外，必须指出的是，美利坚合众国自身的请求要求墨西哥政府采取必要措施，确保任何已提交或将提交的临时逮捕或引渡请求中所包含的信息不被披露或公开，正如本案所发生的那样。这是根据美国当局自己的说法。上述内容考虑到，根据信函本身，为其他目的披露此类信息可能会损害美国刑事诉讼的保密性，并违反管辖这些诉讼的程序规则。《维也纳外交关系公约》本身规定，必须采取适当措施，确保在此类案件中提交的所有信息和文件得到保密和安全处理，以保护所传输的信息。此外，墨西哥法律规定，对于州长和参议员，必须启动弹劾程序，以获得取消担任这些职位的公职人员程序豁免权的声明。对于总检察长办公室而言，在充分尊重国家主权的前提下完全遵守所有法律要求至关重要，否则将违反法治，以及被请求个人的权利和保障，这些权利和保障与请求国一样，是不可剥夺的。法律之外，一无所有。法律之上，无人例外。” @wfwitness

text: OSINTdefender During today’s hearing in front of the House Armed Services Committee regarding the $1.7 trillion defense budget requested by the Trump Administration for 2027, the Under Secretary of Defense (Comptroller), Jules W. Hurst III stated that the Pentagon’s current estimate for the cost of the Iran War is $25 billion. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 在今天众议院军事委员会关于特朗普政府为2027年申请的1.7万亿美元国防预算的听证会上，国防部副部长（审计长）朱尔斯·W·赫斯特三世表示，五角大楼目前对伊朗战争成本的估计为250亿美元。推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Axios: President Donald Trump is set to receive a briefing from CENTCOM on potential military action against Iran, including options for a wave of strikes, operations in the Strait of Hormuz, and securing nuclear material. Officials say the blockade remains the primary strategy, but military options are under consideration. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Axios：唐纳德·特朗普总统将听取中央司令部关于针对伊朗的潜在军事行动的简报，其中包括一系列打击行动、霍尔木兹海峡的行动以及确保核材料安全的选项。官员们表示，封锁仍然是主要战略，但军事选项正在考虑之中。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Instant News Alerts US Central Command has asked to send the Army’s long-delayed Dark Eagle hypersonic missile to the Middle East for possible use against Iran, seeking a longer-range system to hit ballistic-missile launchers deep inside the country. (Bloomberg) tweet
text_zh: 即时新闻快讯：美国中央司令部已请求将陆军迟迟未交付的“暗鹰”（Dark Eagle）高超音速导弹部署至中东，以备对伊朗采取行动。此举旨在寻求一种远程打击系统，用于摧毁伊朗境内深处的弹道导弹发射装置。（彭博社）推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Bloomberg: CENTCOM has requested deployment of the Army’s Dark Eagle hypersonic missile to the Middle East for possible use against Iran, aiming to target ballistic missile launchers deeper inside the country. If approved, it would mark the first operational deployment of the U.S. hypersonic missile system, which has faced delays and has not yet been declared fully operational. The request reportedly states that Iran has moved launchers beyond the range of the Precision Strike Missile, prompting the need for a longer-range option. No final decision has yet been made. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 彭博社：美国中央司令部已请求将陆军的“暗鹰”（Dark Eagle）高超音速导弹部署到中东，以备对伊朗使用，旨在打击伊朗境内更深处的弹道导弹发射装置。如果获得批准，这将是美国高超音速导弹系统的首次实战部署，该系统此前曾面临延误，且尚未宣布完全具备作战能力。据报道，请求中提到伊朗已将发射装置转移至“精确打击导弹”（PrSM）的射程之外，因此需要一种射程更远的选项。目前尚未做出最终决定。@wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Amazon considering reboot of “The Apprentice,” potential host could be Donald Trump Jr. - WSJ https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049665796754821521/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：亚马逊正在考虑重启《飞黄腾达》，潜在主持人可能是小唐纳德·特朗普 - 《华尔街日报》 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049665796754821521/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Reports of significant air-defense activity and explosions throughout the last hour over the Iranian capital of Tehran, with both U.S. and Israeli officials denying renewed strikes against Iran. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：据报道，过去一小时内伊朗首都德黑兰上空出现明显的防空活动和爆炸，美国和以色列官员均否认对伊朗发动了新的袭击。推文

text: Disclose.tv NEW - Australia will implement the "14 recommendations" from the Royal Commission into Antisemitism's report about the Bondi Beach terror attack, 9 of which were made public, 5 were "classified," as they "could compromise sensitive national security information." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2049662243856330844/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv：最新消息——澳大利亚将实施关于邦迪海滩恐怖袭击的皇家反犹太主义委员会报告中的“14项建议”，其中9项已公开，5项被列为“机密”，因为它们“可能泄露敏感的国家安全信息”。https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2049662243856330844/video/1 推文

text: OSINTtechnical CENTCOM is looking to deploy the US Army’s Long-Range Hypersonic Weapon (Dark Eagle) to the Middle East in order to strike missile launchers that have been moved to sites deep within Iran -Bloomberg The Dark Eagle, still undergoing testing, has a limited stockpile of rounds. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2049659409341547008/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical：据彭博社报道，美国中央司令部正寻求在中东部署美国陆军的远程高超音速武器（“暗鹰”），以打击已转移至伊朗深处地点的导弹发射器。目前仍处于测试阶段的“暗鹰”导弹库存有限。https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2049659409341547008/photo/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. President Donald Trump reposted an image on Truth Social showing the Strait of Hormuz labeled as the “Strait of Trump.” @wfwitness

text: U.S. Central Command USS Gerald R. Ford (CVN 78) continues to conduct routine flight operations as it sails in the Red Sea. https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2049656113755218332/photo/1 tweet

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷The U.S. boarded a second tanker, the sanctioned M/T Tifani, in the INDOPACOM area which they allege was transporting support for Iran. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Bloomberg: The U.S. is seeking forfeiture of two Iran-linked oil tankers seized at sea as part of enforcement actions tied to pressure on Tehran. The U.S. Department of Justice has already initiated the forfeiture process for the Tifani and the Phoenix, previously registered as Majestic X, in INDOPACOM’s area of operation. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷美国在印太司令部区域登上了第二艘油轮，即受制裁的 M/T Tifani 号，他们声称该油轮正在为伊朗提供运输支持。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 彭博社：作为对德黑兰施压执法行动的一部分，美国正在寻求没收在海上扣押的两艘与伊朗有关的油轮。美国司法部已经启动了针对 Tifani 号和 Phoenix 号（此前注册名为 Majestic X）的没收程序，这两艘船均位于印太司令部的行动区域内。@wfwitness

text: Disclose.tv NEW - European Investment Bank Chief, says EIB, a "non-profit institution," is "the climate bank," and that cities are increasing investment in the "green transition" to protect their citizens, "it’s about safety and security at the end of the day." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2049648377797714365/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息 - 欧洲投资银行行长表示，作为一家“非营利机构”，欧洲投资银行是“气候银行”，各城市正在增加对“绿色转型”的投资以保护其公民，“归根结底，这关乎安全与保障。” https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2049648377797714365/video/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - FED Chair Jerome Powell says when he steps down he will still serve on the board, as a governor but "keep a low profile," as he is concerned "about the series of legal attacks on the Fed" from the Trump Admin, that are "unprecedented in our 113 year history." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2049640589746999304/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯 - 美联储主席杰罗姆·鲍威尔表示，他卸任后仍将以理事身份留在董事会，但会“保持低调”，因为他担心特朗普政府对美联储发起的“一系列法律攻击”，这是“我们113年历史上前所未有的”。https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2049640589746999304/video/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index The Trump administration is 'asking other countries to join a new international coalition' to help open the Strait of Hormuz, according to Wall Street Journal report. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 据《华尔街日报》报道，特朗普政府正在“要求其他国家加入一个新的国际联盟”，以帮助开放霍尔木兹海峡。推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) Per Bloomberg, the U.S. Central Command has asked to send the new Dark Eagle Long Range Hypersonic Weapon to the Middle East region for possible use against Iran. If approved, it would mark the first time the US will have operationally deployed its new hypersonic missile. https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2049637727310635233/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 据彭博社报道，美国中央司令部已请求将新型“暗鹰”远程高超音速武器部署到中东地区，以备对伊朗使用。如果获得批准，这将是美国首次实战部署其新型高超音速导弹。https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2049637727310635233/photo/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ: The Trump administration is seeking international partners for a new “Maritime Freedom Construct” coalition aimed at restoring navigation through the Strait of Hormuz. The plan includes diplomatic coordination, intelligence sharing, and sanctions enforcement, with State Department and CENTCOM roles outlined in the effort. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 《华尔街日报》：特朗普政府正在为一个新的“海上自由架构”联盟寻求国际合作伙伴，旨在恢复霍尔木兹海峡的航行。该计划包括外交协调、情报共享和制裁执行，并概述了国务院和中央司令部在此项工作中的角色。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇸🇩🇪 Trump is now angry at Germany's Merz. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇺🇸 🇩🇪 Looks like Trump is still angry at Merz 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Open Source Intel U.S. President Donald Trump told Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu that Israel should carry out only “surgical” military action in Lebanon and avoid a full resumption of war. "I told Netanyahu he has got to do it more surgically. Not knock down buildings. He can't do it. It is too terrible and makes Israel look bad," he told Axios in a phone interview. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：美国总统唐纳德·特朗普告诉以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡，以色列应该在黎巴嫩采取“外科手术式”的军事行动，并避免全面恢复战争。“我告诉内塔尼亚胡，他必须采取更精准的手段。不要摧毁建筑物。他不能这样做。这太可怕了，而且让以色列看起来很糟糕，”他在接受Axios电话采访时说。推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. President Donald Trump: "The United States is studying and reviewing the possible reduction of Troops in Germany, with a determination to be made over the next short period of time. Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DONALD J. TRUMP." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049624234033320355/photo/1 tweet

text: The Spectator Index US crude oil now up 8.5%, as energy prices continue to surge. tweet

text: WarMonitor Justin Amash says FISA 702 just passed the House, allowing warrantless searches of Americans’ private communications, which he argues violates the Fourth Amendment. tweet
text_zh: 战争监测：贾斯汀·阿马什表示，FISA 702法案刚刚在众议院获得通过，允许在没有搜查令的情况下搜查美国人的私人通讯，他认为这违反了第四修正案。推文

text: 🇮🇷 Iran's Navy Commander Rear Admiral Shahram Irani warned that Iran will soon confront its enemies with a "very dreadful weapon," describing it as one the enemy is "deeply afraid of." He highlighted Iran's successful retaliation against recent aggression, including seven missile strikes against the U.S. aircraft carrier Abraham Lincoln and at least 100 operations targeting American and Israeli assets. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗海军司令沙赫拉姆·伊拉尼海军少将警告称，伊朗很快将用一种“非常可怕的武器”对抗其敌人，并称这是敌人“深感恐惧”的武器。他强调了伊朗对近期侵略行为的成功报复，包括对美国“亚伯拉罕·林肯”号航空母舰的七次导弹袭击，以及针对美国和以色列资产的至少100次行动。🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: The Israeli army's mission in southern Lebanon is now focused on the “systematic destruction” of buildings rather than combat, IDF officers have told Haaretz. According to the report, the military is operating under a plan to demolish predominantly Shia villages in an effort they believe would prevent residents from returning.
text_zh: 以色列国防军军官告诉《国土报》，以色列军队在黎巴嫩南部的任务现在集中于“系统性摧毁”建筑物，而非战斗。据报道，军方正在执行一项拆除什叶派村庄的计划，他们认为此举将阻止居民返回。

text: 🇮🇷 Major General Mohsen Rezaee: If a war breaks out again, it will be focused on the southern coasts, near Isfahan, and somewhat in the west of the country. They might also carry out some bombings and assassinations in Tehran, because nothing else remains and all military plans have failed. This is the last plan on the table. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇮🇷 穆赫辛·雷扎伊少将：如果战争再次爆发，它将集中在南部海岸、伊斯法罕附近以及该国西部地区。他们可能还会对德黑兰进行一些轰炸和暗杀，因为除此之外已别无他法，所有的军事计划都已失败。这是桌面上最后的计划。🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: Nuno Felix Day 16 of 13 till Iranian oil collapse…. According to Albanian State Media of 1980s “Right now there are 41 tankers with 69 million barrels of oil that the Iranian regime can’t sell. That’s an estimated $6 billion-plus from which Iran’s leadership cannot financially benefit.” https://twitter.com/mdubowitz/status/2049605850512101851/photo/1 - Mark Dubowitz tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 距离伊朗石油崩溃还有13天中的第16天……根据20世纪80年代阿尔巴尼亚官方媒体的报道：“目前有41艘油轮载有6900万桶石油，伊朗政权无法出售。据估计，伊朗领导层无法从中获得超过60亿美元的经济利益。” https://twitter.com/mdubowitz/status/2049605850512101851/photo/1 - Mark Dubowitz 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) 🧐 Russian Foreign Ministry rejected the possibility of using nuclear weapons in Ukraine. "We consider it necessary to refute the baseless speculation that Russia is allegedly considering the use of nuclear weapons in Ukraine or threatening to use them. It is clear that this is being done specifically to whip up anti-Russian hysteria," the Ambassador-at-Large of the Russian MFA Andrei Belousov said. tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 🧐 俄罗斯外交部否认了在乌克兰使用核武器的可能性。“我们认为有必要反驳那种毫无根据的猜测，即俄罗斯据称正在考虑在乌克兰使用核武器或威胁使用核武器。很明显，这样做纯粹是为了煽动反俄歇斯底里，”俄罗斯外交部无任所大使安德烈·别洛乌索夫表示。推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @APHClarkson : The idea that European societies that have been endemically waging warfare of some kind or other for over 3000 years cannot cope without America's protection has always been one of the dumber geopolitical memes among American elites tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix RT @APHClarkson : 认为那些已经断断续续进行了3000多年战争的欧洲社会如果没有美国的保护就无法生存，这一直是美国精英阶层中最愚蠢的地缘政治迷因之一。推文

text: Nuno Felix This is going great…. Most oil "experts" are industry shills. They told us that Dated Brent can't fall because the physical shortage is too great. Well, Dated Brent fell $20 in one day on Friday. The stuff from these guys is just scare-mongering. Same as in 2022 after Ukraine. https://robinjbrooks.substack.com/p/this-week-is-a-catalyst-for-oil-prices https://twitter.com/robin_j_brooks/status/2045865948528144461/photo/1 - Robin Brooks tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 这进展得太顺利了……大多数石油“专家”都是行业托儿。他们告诉我们，Dated Brent（即期布伦特原油）不会下跌，因为实物短缺太严重了。好吧，周五Dated Brent一天之内下跌了20美元。这些家伙的东西纯粹是危言耸听。和2022年乌克兰事件后一样。 https://robinjbrooks.substack.com/p/this-week-is-a-catalyst-for-oil-prices https://twitter.com/robin_j_brooks/status/2045865948528144461/photo/1 - Robin Brooks 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @tleilax___ : "Germany has quadrupled is annual artillery production to over 1 million rounds a year rivalling the US." Günther's been busy and you are still not long enough European defense stocks. Quite the sight. The world is not prepared to see 55 year blokes named Lars reprogram the CNC machines at Lego to make armor piercing 30mm autocannon rounds by the billions. These guys are best know commercially as Raufoss, makers of the famous .50 Cal Mark 211 Raufoss sniper round. Oh and Lars has a distant cousin named Günther doing the exact same thing with Volkswagen's underutilized production lines. - Yet another commodity guy tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix RT @tleilax___ : “德国已将其年度火炮产量翻了两番，达到每年超过100万发，足以与美国抗衡。” 冈特（Günther）一直很忙，而你仍然没有做多欧洲国防股。真是奇观。世界还没准备好看到55岁名叫拉尔斯（Lars）的家伙重新编程乐高（Lego）的数控机床，以数十亿计地制造穿甲30毫米自动炮弹。这些家伙在商业上最出名的是Raufoss，著名的.50口径Mark 211 Raufoss狙击弹的制造商。哦，拉尔斯还有个远房表亲叫冈特，正在大众汽车未充分利用的生产线上做同样的事情。 - 又一个大宗商品交易员推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @tleilax___ : Quite the sight. The world is not prepared to see 55 year blokes named Lars reprogram the CNC machines at Lego to make armor piercing 30mm autocannon rounds by the billions. These guys are best know commercially as Raufoss, makers of the famous .50 Cal Mark 211 Raufoss sniper round. Oh and Lars has a distant cousin named Günther doing the exact same thing with Volkswagen's underutilized production lines. Denmark will officially reopen the Ammunitionsarsenalet AMA ammunition plant in North Jutland, with the Norwegian-Finnish defence giant Nammo running the 350-year-old facility. The Danish government will rush to get production lines running as soon as possible. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/1895902276956668134/photo/1 - OSINTtechnical tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix RT @tleilax___ : 真是奇观。世界还没准备好看到55岁名叫拉尔斯（Lars）的家伙重新编程乐高（Lego）的数控机床，以数十亿计地制造穿甲30毫米自动炮弹。这些家伙在商业上最出名的是Raufoss，著名的.50口径Mark 211 Raufoss狙击弹的制造商。哦，拉尔斯还有个远房表亲叫冈特，正在大众汽车未充分利用的生产线上做同样的事情。丹麦将正式重新开放位于北日德兰半岛的Ammunitionsarsenalet AMA弹药厂，由挪威-芬兰国防巨头Nammo运营这个拥有350年历史的设施。丹麦政府将争分夺秒地尽快让生产线运转起来。 https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/1895902276956668134/photo/1 - OSINTtechnical 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @JavierBlas : Total CEO Patrick Pouyanne says the company's instruction to its refineries is "max jet [fuel] first, and then max diesel." tweet

text: WarMonitor Newly obtained documents show Trump administration officials left a clear paper trail for sharing sensitive voter data with an outside political group working to overturn elections, under a secret agreement. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2049614829158101496/photo/1 tweet

text: 🇸🇦 l 🇱🇧 Beirut Review has learned that Yazeed bin Farhan, an advisor to the Saudi Minister of Foreign Affairs, intervened to advocate for the appointment of Judge Ahmed Rami al-Hajj to the position of Discriminatory Public Prosecutor in Lebanon. It is noteworthy that the candidate favored by the President of the Republic was Judge Joseph Aoun, while the candidate favored by the Prime Minister, Nawaf Salam, was Judge Osama Mneimneh. However, Bin Farhan’s intervention boosted the prospects of Judge al-Hajj—who has more than 19 years remaining in the judicial service before reaching retirement age—thereby solidifying control over the most critical judicial institution for an extended period. Thus, Lebanon today reverts to the pre-2005 era—a period characterized by the interference of external powers in the appointment of senior judicial officials, most notably the Discriminatory Public Prosecutor.
text_zh: 🇸🇦 l 🇱🇧 贝鲁特评论（Beirut Review）获悉，沙特外交大臣顾问亚齐德·本·法尔汉（Yazeed bin Farhan）介入，主张任命艾哈迈德·拉米·哈吉（Ahmed Rami al-Hajj）法官担任黎巴嫩歧视性公诉人。值得注意的是，共和国总统青睐的候选人是约瑟夫·奥恩（Joseph Aoun）法官，而总理纳吉布·米卡提（Nawaf Salam）青睐的候选人是奥萨马·姆内姆内（Osama Mneimneh）法官。然而，本·法尔汉的干预提高了哈吉法官的胜算——他在达到退休年龄前还有超过19年的司法服务期——从而长期巩固了对这一最关键司法机构的控制。因此，黎巴嫩今天回到了2005年之前的时代——一个以外部势力干预高级司法官员（尤其是歧视性公诉人）任命为特征的时期。

text: OSINTdefender According to a statement from U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) Commander Admiral Brad Cooper, the U.S. has now directed 42 vessels to turn back to Iranian ports or turn away from transiting since the beginning of the U.S blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. 200 aircraft and 25 ships are involved in the operation to deny vessels access to Iranian ports, per the release. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 根据美国中央司令部（CENTCOM）司令布拉德·库珀（Brad Cooper）海军上将的声明，自美国封锁霍尔木兹海峡以来，美国已指示42艘船只返回伊朗港口或放弃过境。据发布的消息称，有200架飞机和25艘舰艇参与了阻止船只进入伊朗港口的行动。推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🤡 🤡 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 Kremlin: ☎️ Vladimir Putin and Donald Trump held a phone call lasting more than 1.5 hours. 🗣️ Putin told Trump he is ready to declare a ceasefire during the Victory Day period, a move Trump reportedly supported. 🔺 During the conversation, Putin warned of extremely destructive consequences if the U.S. and Israel resume military operations against Iran in the Middle East. 🔹 Trump said that a deal to resolve the Ukraine conflict is close, with both leaders suggesting that Volodymyr Zelensky is contributing to prolonging the war. 🗣️ Putin also reiterated that Russia will achieve its objectives in the war in Ukraine. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🤡 🤡 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 克里姆林宫：☎️ 弗拉基米尔·普京与唐纳德·特朗普进行了超过1.5小时的通话。🗣️ 普京告诉特朗普，他准备在胜利日期间宣布停火，据报道特朗普对此表示支持。🔺 在谈话中，普京警告称，如果美国和以色列在中东恢复针对伊朗的军事行动，将产生极其破坏性的后果。🔹 特朗普表示，解决乌克兰冲突的协议已接近达成，两位领导人都暗示弗拉基米尔·泽连斯基正在助长战争的延长。🗣️ 普京还重申，俄罗斯将在乌克兰战争中实现其目标。通过我们查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文
